message:
feat(demo_showcase): add live dashboard metrics with hysteresis

Add DashboardMetrics struct with:
- requests_per_sec: RPS with inverted thresholds (lower is worse)
- p95_latency_ms: P95 latency in ms
- error_rate: Error percentage
- job_throughput: Jobs/minute with inverted thresholds

LiveMetric provides:
- Value history (last 60 samples)
- Automatic trend calculation (Up/Down/Flat)
- Health state with hysteresis to prevent flapping
- Warning/error thresholds with configurable inversion

MetricHealthChanged event allows dashboard to show toasts
when metrics transition between health states.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
